series_metadata.series_description: Includes public records comprised of internally generated correspondence (letters, memorandums) in paper or electronic format; and correspondence from the general public and/or licensees/registrants requesting information pertaining to the Board, application requirements, laws and rules, or other notifications or other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (does not attempt to influence agency policy).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: , unless correspondence has administrative, legal, historical value, or is defined as Executive Correspondence that deals with significant aspects of administration of agency (i.e. seeks establish board policy or procedure, programs, fiscal, or personnel matters). ; Electronic: , unless correspondence has administrative, legal, historical value, or is defined as Executive Correspondence that deals with significant aspects of administration of agency (i.e. seeks establish board policy or procedure, programs, fiscal, or personnel matters)
